title: The Biggest Fair Value Gap Myth Costing Traders in 2026
description: Everyone thinks Fair Value Gaps always get filled. That belief alone has blown thousands of funded accounts. Here's the truth the R2F Trading system teaches — and what smart money is actually doing with FVGs right now.
script: Everyone says Fair Value Gaps always get filled. That one belief blew my funded account in 3 weeks flat. Retail traders chase every FVG like it's guaranteed. But 40% of institutional FVGs never get revisited. Smart money doesn't wait — it moves on. The truth? Only FVGs inside a confirmed order block, aligned with the higher timeframe bias, carry real edge. Context is everything. The gap alone means nothing. Stop trading FVGs blind. The R2F Trading system shows you exactly which gaps matter — and which ones trap beginners. Follow R2F Trading. New setups every day.
